name: Adobe, Inc.
lede: Adobe runs six centers across four Indian cities. Noida, Pune, Hyderabad and Bengaluru, covering GBS, R&D, CoE and IT, built over 27 years.
insight: Search elsewhere and you will usually find one Adobe office in India. We map six, across four cities, each tagged by center type and function. Knowing the whole footprint is what turns a name on a list into an account you can plan against.
metaTitle: Adobe, Inc. GCC in India: Centers, Footprint & Leaders | Bamboo Reports
metaDescription: Adobe runs 6 verified centers across 4 Indian cities (Noida, Pune, Hyderabad, Bengaluru), covering GBS, R&D, CoE and IT. See the full India footprint, org map and contacts on Bamboo Reports.

leaders.departments: Finance, IT, HR, GCC leadership and Procurement

titles.title: Vice President & General Manager, Adobe Digital Advertising, Learning, & Publishing Business

about.description: Adobe's India footprint covers Noida, Pune, Hyderabad and Bengaluru, spanning GBS, R&D, CoE and IT. The centers deliver IT, Finance & Accounting, HR and Sales & Marketing for the group's global operations.

bandCopy: Exact center locations, per-center headcount, the technology stack and all 285 decision-makers, in one profile.

faq.q: How many centers does Adobe operate in India?
faq.a: Adobe operates 6 active centers in India.

faq.q: Which Indian cities does Adobe have centers in?
faq.a: Adobe's India footprint includes Noida and 3 additional cities.

faq.q: What types of centers does Adobe run in India?
faq.a: Adobe runs GBS and 3 additional center types in India.

faq.q: How many people work at Adobe's India centers?
faq.a: Aggregate and center-level headcount for Adobe's India operations is available in the full profile.

faq.q: Who leads Adobe's GCC in India?
faq.a: Bamboo Reports tracks leaders at Adobe's India centers, across Finance and other leadership functions. Names and contact details open with a free account.

sources: company filings, LinkedIn, NASSCOM and Bamboo Reports' primary research
